tools.name: census_list_sources
tools.description: List configured data warehouse sources (Snowflake, BigQuery, Redshift, Databricks, etc.). Census: GET /sources.

tools.name: census_get_source
tools.description: Get a single source connection by id. Census: GET /sources/{id}.

tools.name: census_list_destinations
tools.description: List configured destination connections (SaaS apps data is synced INTO, e.g. Salesforce, HubSpot, Marketo). Census: GET /destinations.

tools.name: census_get_destination
tools.description: Get a single destination connection by id. Census: GET /destinations/{id}.

tools.name: census_list_models
tools.description: List SQL models / datasets defined in the workspace (the queries that produce rows to sync). Census: GET /models.

tools.name: census_get_model
tools.description: Get a single model by id, including its SQL/query. Census: GET /models/{id}.

tools.name: census_list_syncs
tools.description: List syncs (a sync maps a source model to a destination object and keeps them in sync). Returns id, label, status, source_attributes, destination_attributes. Census: GET /syncs.

tools.name: census_get_sync
tools.description: Get a single sync's full configuration by id. Census: GET /syncs/{id}.

tools.name: census_list_sync_runs
tools.description: List sync run history (each run's status, records processed, timing). Filter by sync_id. Census: GET /sync_runs.

tools.name: census_get_sync_run
tools.description: Get a single sync run by id — status, counts, errors. Census: GET /sync_runs/{id}.

tools.name: census_list_segments
tools.description: List audience segments defined in the workspace. Census: GET /segments.

tools.name: census_list_workspaces
tools.description: List workspaces in the organization (note: usually requires an organization-level token). Census: GET /workspaces.

tools.name: census_trigger_sync
tools.description: TRIGGERS a sync run for the given sync id — this KICKS OFF a live data sync that writes records into the connected destination SaaS tool. Set force_full_sync=true to re-sync all rows instead of just changes. Census: POST /syncs/{id}/trigger.
